basic_details.job_title: IIGM Young Professional Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Geomagnetism (IIGM) has published the Young Professional Notification 2026. The recruitment drive aims to fill Young Professional positions in various disciplines. Candidates holding qualifications such as PG Degree/PG Diploma in Journalism & Mass Communication/Public Relations/Media Science, Law Degree, Master’s Degree in Physics/Geophysics/Geology/Atmospheric Sciences/Physical Sciences, Instrumentation/Applied Physics, or MBA/Public Administration are eligible to apply through email mode at the official website iigm.res.in. The application process will remain active until

age_limit.details: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.

qualification.education_qualification: PG Degree/PG Diploma in Journalism and Mass communication/Public Relations/Media Science, Degree in Law, Master's Degree in Physics/Geophysics/Geology/Atmospheric Sciences/Physical Sciences, Master's Degree in Instrumentation/Physics/Applied Physics/Geophysics, Masters in Business Administration (HR, Finance)/Public Administration
qualification.details: Public Relations (Outreach & Media): PG Degree/PG Diploma in Journalism and Mass communication/Public Relations/Media Science etc. with Minimum 2 years experience. Legal: Degree in Law from a recognized university with Minimum 2 years experience. Scientific Research: Master's Degree in Physics/Geophysics/Geology/Atmospheric Sciences/Physical Sciences with at least 60% marks and Two years research experience in a relevant subject after completion of Master's degree. Technical: Master's Degree in Instrumentation/Physics/Applied Physics/Geophysics with at least 55% marks and Minimum Two years experience in a research organization in a relevant field. Administration: Masters in Business Administration (HR, Finance)/Public Administration with Minimum two years experience in Govt. Organization in a relevant field.

salary_details.details: Please refer to the official notification for salary details.

selection_process: Please refer to the official notification for selection process details.
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for IIGM Various Posts Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
